hero.description: CucumberHTML is built on the belief that technical precision should be accessible to everyone. Your sponsorship directly funds independent development, ensuring the ecosystem remains modern, secure, and sustainable for the long term.

benefits.title: Faster Core Development
benefits.description: Sponsorship allows our core maintainers to dedicate full-time hours to performance optimizations and new feature implementations, reducing the release cycle by 40%.

benefits.title: Editorial Quality Docs
benefits.description: We believe documentation is a first-class feature. Funds help us maintain high-fidelity tutorials and API references.

benefits.title: Security Audits
benefits.description: Dedicated maintenance includes quarterly security sweeps and dependency hardening.

benefits.title: Priority Bug Fixes
benefits.description: Community-reported issues are triaged and resolved with precision, ensuring the stable branch remains production-ready at all times for enterprises and individuals alike.

tiers.title: Choose Your Tier
tiers.description: Support the project at a level that fits your contribution capacity. Every bit counts towards engineering excellence.

curators.title: Meet the Curators
curators.description: The organizations and individuals keeping the project alive.

items.question: Where does the money go?
items.answer: 100% of funds (after platform fees) go towards project expenses: paying maintainers for focused dev time, hosting our documentation infrastructure, and sponsoring upstream dependencies we rely on.

items.question: Can I manage or cancel my sponsorship?
items.answer: Yes, all billing is handled through GitHub Sponsors or Open Collective. You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel your recurring contribution at any time through their respective dashboards.

items.question: Do you accept corporate sponsorships via invoice?
items.answer: For Gold and Silver tiers, we can provide manual invoicing. Please contact our core team directly via the support email in the documentation footer.

cta.title: Ready to curate the future with us?
